heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 2710 Authorization of appropriations
text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out the purposes of this chapter, in addition to any amounts made available for such purposes pursuant to title I of this Act, the sum of $12,500,000 for the fiscal year ending .September 30, 1978
notes: References in TextTitle I of this Act, referred to in text, is title I (§§ 101–107) of , , . For complete classification of this title to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 95–23892 Stat. 47Feb. 25, 1978
